title: GEAR AID 2-Pack Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches for Tent and Bug Screen Repair, 3"
description:
Quickly repair a torn tent or bug screen with Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches. With two, round 3" Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches enclosed, easily cover up any small hole or tear at home or at the campsite. Safe for use on bug netting, mesh, no-see-um, and even RV screens or outdoor sunshade. Simply peel-and-stick the Tenacious Tape ring over the tear and the mesh screen is instantly good as new.

GEAR AID 2-Pack Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches for Tent and Bug Screen Repair, 3"

Quickly repair a torn tent or bug screen with Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches. With two, round 3" Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches enclosed, easily cover up any small hole or tear at home or at the campsite. Safe for use on bug netting, mesh, no-see-um, and even RV screens or outdoor sunshade. Simply peel-and-stick the Tenacious Tape ring over the tear and the mesh screen is instantly good as new.

Key Features

  • Repair rips and tears on tent or bug screens, mosquito netting and no-see-ums instantly; no heat required
  • Peel-and-stick the 3” round, mesh patches by removing the backing and applying pressure; adheres to all types of screens and synthetic fabrics
  • Take this lightweight mesh repair kit on any adventure as part of any gear box; includes 2 patches per pack
  • Fix a variety of outdoor screens including bug netting, tent mesh, RV awning/sunshade
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 10665
  • Color: Black
